heading: Civil penalty
label: 70119 Civil penalty
notes: CodificationAnother section 70119 was renumbered .section 70118 of this title
Amendments2006— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, substituted “day during which the violation continues” for “violation”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 109–241
amendments: Amendments2006— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, substituted “day during which the violation continues” for “violation”, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 109–241

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Any person that violates this chapter or any regulation under this chapter shall be liable to the United States for a civil penalty of not more than $25,000 for each day during which the violation continues.

children.heading: .—Continuing Violations
children.label: b .—Continuing Violations
children.text: The maximum amount of a civil penalty for a violation under this section shall not exceed $50,000.
